content:
🚀 tlock | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Encrypting data that should only become accessible at a specific future point in time, determined by a drand network round.
✨ Key Features: • Timelock encryption and decryption • Integration with drand threshold network • Go library and `tle` CLI tool • Support for mainnet and testnet drand networks • Production-ready mainnet with high-availability guarantees
📖 Summary: The tlock library and tle command-line tool enable practical timelock encryption and decryption using drand's threshold network. It allows users to encrypt data that can only be decrypted after a specified future round, providing a way to schedule future access to sensitive information.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
